heading: Welcome To Pentamed

PENTAMED  | HOME pentamedhospital@gmail.com 24 Hrs Helpline : 011-47014701 Home Specialities Services & Facilities Empanelment Media Room Photo Gallery Video Gallery About Us Make an Appointment Request Appoinment Find Doctors Online Reports Welcome To Pentamed Welcome to Pentamed Hospital, where compassionate care meets advanced medical expertise. Founded in 1996 by a dedicated team of five visionary doctors, Pentamed Hospital was established with a singular mission: to provide personalized, high-quality healthcare that prioritizes the needs and well-being of each patient. (GASTRO) MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Dr. Sourabh Rajendra Singh Bagga M.B.B.S MD,  DM (CARDIOLOGIST) MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Dr. Mandeep Singh Clinical Assistant Dept. of Medicine MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Dr. Divya Pahuja MBBS, DNB Radiodiagnosis MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Dr. Vidhi Chopra M.B.B.S, MS (ENT) MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Dr. Pawan Goel M.B.B.S, MD, DM  Endocrinology MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Dr. Pritpal Singh Jolly Consultant Surgeon MAKE AN APPOINTMENT Patient Reviews I-am-blessed "I am blessed dr. Pankaj Anand is my doc! Thank you so much for the great care and surgery you performed on me" BHARTI SACHDEVA "very good hospital. The best hospital in Model Town. Doctors are very good." Sarthak Sharma "My Mother recently got admitted and all went smooth starting from admission to discharge procedure. Dr. Nagesh Jain and team is extremely helpful and specialized. I really want to appreciate the efforts and empathetic behavior of the nursing staff namely, Shobhna, Sarita, Preeti and Simran for their outstanding services during my mother's recovery post surgery. Thank you entire Pentamed team for your support" Shilpa Sehgal "I have been visiting hospital since last years... Dr Rajesh Gupta is a gem...hospital staff is cooperative." Sameeksha Sharma "Nice hospital with well trained and knowledgeable staff. I consulted with Dr. Sumita Paul regarding my gynae problem she was very nice and helpful. She is prompt with on call consultation anytime of the day. I am currently recovering and satisfied with the service." Sumit Budhiraja "Was taken to emergency for viral then admitted for 2 days for the same. The care i got in the hospital is unbelievable, the staff took such good care and the doctors were so promt. Really feels nice that in such a day there are so caring ppl. Overall a very good experience." Anil Thadani "This is the only hospital who was attending any covid patient with deep help when Delhi was in a mess ... for me Dr Rajesh Gupta is a hero .. a gem and God. He was a doctor who was most of the time in the hospital dedicated to covid patients risking all his life for the mankind. Even the staff was wonderfully supportive. The best part is that doctor comes to the round himself twice a day and he is anytime and every time available. Respected Sir and all the people who are working did you .. have done finest job during covid .. I had been knowing the Dr sir abs this hospital since last 10 years and most of my family is getting a regular treatment without any hesitation and we are treats like a family. I personally think that in this time of distress there is no other hospital which is friendly and helpful." Saurabh Aggarwal "Five star hospital osim services gud staff everyone is very nice I m satisfied since I was young. i will recommend too each and every knows of mine Dr. Nagesh Jain uncle ji is very friendly polite caring and each and every Dr is caring everything which is expected from patient .food quality osim canteen superb I m happy with their services first ever best hospital in all over India and Delhi. I know uncle since long the first time I visited Dr. Nagesh Jain and what a gud Dr I ever seen in my life. he attends patients very friendly. Dr. Rajesh Gupta uncle ji is very friendly polite caring." Shreya Sawhney "Good and humble doctors. I do not trust any other hospital more than this one. I had a really bad accident but Dr. Nagesh Jain was very supporting" Tarqeem Haider "One of the best hospital in that area...from casualty incharge Dr Sharad to ICU Incharge Dr Raj , every Doctor and staff is very helpful and cooperative...Highly recommended." Ishu Luthra "One of the best and affordable hospitals in north Delhi.. Dr. Rajesh Gupta team is one of the best units of the hospital. Professional staff and well maintained hospital as compared to overpriced hospitals like Fortis and Max." Manoj Bhansali "Its a best hospital near my sisters house. They had provided there best treatment. I hope she will soon recover her health and get well." ANKIT SUKHIJA "Best experience of my life. Saved my mom and wife both. Thanks Dr. Rajesh and Team." Tuhina Bose "Good caring doctors. Services is upto the mark!" Pradyumn Kumar Pandey "Best team of doctors... Humble and helpful staff members" Ekam Banerjee "Very nice er. Very safe. Nice doctors" Meenu Kohli "Good service staff (house keeping department, nurses and RMO )" Hira Lal "The staff and doctors are very nice and fully cooperate." Sahil Taneja "Very good hospital with best physician, surgeon, pediatrician, gynaecologist in town." Manish Rao "Its really a very gd setup....as i workd there. ......among best care...." vijay jha "All staff are quickly respond, loved the way off talking off staff" Sahaj Jain "Best team of Doctors" R S TRADING CO. "Helpful Doctors & Services..." We Provide the highest level of satisfaction care & services to
